g.text: Normal Account Classification By Sport - SP GetCurrentCategory Detailed Flow
WHERE CustID IN (SELECT CustID FROM Temp_InvalidCust)
CASE WHEN tmpCc.CreatedDate <= DATE_SUB(CurrentDate, INTERVAL CAST(s.ItemValue AS UNSIGNED) DAY)
THEN 0 ELSE tmpCc.CategoryGroupID END AS CategoryID
THEN 0 ELSE tmpCc.IsProbationLastDay END AS IsProbationLastDay
